Brand.name: STANDLO
Brand.description: STANDLO introduces TIM (Temporary Information Modeling): the operating system that transforms data into physical structures. Manage trade show booths and emergency modules with millimetric synchrony, instant payments, and predictive logistics. Welcome to the Temporary Flow.

Designer.title: Design Studio
Designer.subtitle: View design requests and briefs from Standlo customers.

Customer.title: Customer Dashboard
Customer.subtitle: Welcome to your STANDLO operational portal. From here you can manage your events, orders, and team.

Manager.title: Ops Manager
Manager.subtitle: Supervise operations, manage complex projects, and monitor partner workflows.

Common.genericError: There was a problem processing your request.

Register.title: Create an Account
Register.description: Join STANDLO to manage your operations.
Register.acceptTerms: I accept the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and the <termsLink>Terms & Conditions</termsLink>.

Login.title: Log in to STANDLO
Login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account.
Login.footerNote: By clicking continue, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

Auth.title: Log in to STANDLO
Auth.description: Enter your credentials to access the operational portal.
Auth.footerNote: * Access may require a two-step verification (MFA SMS) for administrative roles.

Errors.auth/email-already-in-use: This email is already associated with an account.
Errors.auth/user-not-found: No account found for this email.
Errors.auth/wrong-password: The password you entered is incorrect.
Errors.auth/weak-password: The password is too weak (minimum 6 characters).
Errors.auth/too-many-requests: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
Errors.auth/user-disabled: This account has been disabled by the administrator.
Errors.auth/network-request-failed: Network error. Please check your connection.
Errors.auth/popup-closed-by-user: The sign-in window was closed before completion.
Errors.auth/account-exists-with-different-crede: You already have an account with this email linked to another provider.
Errors.default: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
Errors.auth-missing-terms: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions before continuing.

VerifyEmail.title: Verify your Email address
VerifyEmail.description: We sent an email to the address associated with your account. Please click the confirmation link to continue.
VerifyEmail.errorMessage: Could not confirm your email right now. Please try again later.
VerifyEmail.notVerifiedMessage: Your email is not verified yet. Please check your inbox or wait a moment.

Action.title: Processing Request
Action.description: Please wait while we verify your secure link.
Action.errorMessage: An error occurred while processing your request.

Register.title: Create Customer Account
Register.description: Open registration is reserved exclusively for customers. Partners and suppliers are invited.

Onboarding.title: Complete Your B2B Profile
Onboarding.subtitle: To continue using Standlo, we need some mandatory information for billing.

devMode.title: Work in Progress
devMode.description: The environment dedicated to this role is currently under development. We are creating tailor-made tools to optimize your workflow. Check back soon!
